# Web3 Developer Portfolio - LLMs.txt

> This file provides AI systems and LLM agents with context about Neil Yan, a Web3/Blockchain independent developer portfolio.
> Last updated: 2026-04-19

## About

**Neil Yan** is a Web3/Blockchain independent developer based in China, specializing in DeFi, DApp development, and AI-powered trading solutions.

- Experience: Since 2018
- Expertise: Smart Contracts (Solidity), Frontend (React, Next.js, Vue), Web3 Integration (Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, Solana, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche)
- Products built: 4+ Web3 DApps

## Projects

### 1. AI Quant Robot (https://quant.0xx402.com)
- AI-powered quantitative trading platform
- Four investment packages: Smart Kitty (0.3%/day), Quant Hunter (0.8%/day), Gold Digger (1.2%/day), Institutional (1.5%/day)
- Multi-chain: Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, Arbitrum, Optimism, etc.
- MetaMask, WalletConnect, Coinbase wallet support

### 2. Crypto Earn (https://earn.0xx402.com)
- USDT smart savings platform
- Products: Locked (18.5% APY), Stable (12.5% APY), Flexible (8.2% APY)
- 15+ chains supported
- Daily settlement, non-custodial

### 3. Perpetual Trading (https://futures.0xx402.com)
- Perpetual futures trading interface
- Trading pairs: BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL
- Leverage: 1-50x
- Interactive K-line charts

### 4. Prediction Market (https://prediction.0xx402.com)
- Decentralized prediction market platform
- Create custom prediction events
- Blockchain-based, transparent, non-tamperable

## Tech Stack

| Category | Technologies |
|----------|------------|
| Blockchain | Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, Solana, Avalanche, Arbitrum, Optimism |
| Smart Contracts | Solidity, Hardhat, Foundry, OpenZeppelin |
| Frontend | React, Next.js, Vue, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS |
| Web3 Libraries | Ethers.js, viem, wagmi, Reown AppKit |
| Backend | Node.js, Java, Python, Express, Spring Boot |
| Database | MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Supabase |
| AI | Google Gemini API, OpenAI, 阿里云通义千问 |
| Deployment | Vercel, Railway, Docker, 阿里云, 腾讯云, AWS |

## Services

- Web3 DApp development (concept to deployment)
- Smart contract development and deployment
- DeFi project development (liquidity, lending, trading platforms)
- NFT platforms (minting, trading, marketplace)
- Data dashboards
- Technical consulting
- Cloud deployment
